messages.content: # Wondering what the default, important shortcuts are? Read this guide!

# Car Functions
> CTRL+A ABS on/off
> CTRL+T Traction control modes on/off
> CTRL+G Gearbox Auto
> Num +/- Change Force Feedback

# Interface
> F9 Show/hide bottom leaderboard
> F11 Show/hide virtual mirror
> CTRL+H Show/hide apps
> CTRL+L Show/hide opponents name
> Ctrl+I Show/hide Racing line
> Alt+Enter Fullscreen

# Camera
> Ctrl +/- Change onboard FOV
> F1 Cycle car cameras
> F3 Track cameras
> F5 Orbit camera
> F6 Cycle on-board extra cameras
> F7 Free camera (flying cam)
> F8 In-game screenshot
> F12 (Steam related) Screenshot
